curation_notes: Re-curation. Patch commit 6fe86ee referenced directly in the advisory. Only one source file changed (windows/winkernel_mm.c) in the cs_winkernel_malloc function. The fix adds an integer overflow check using RtlSizeTAdd before computing the allocation size (size + sizeof(CS_WINKERNEL_MEMBLOCK)). No sibling files in the windows/ directory share the same vulnerability pattern. L3 hints updated to be more specific than L1/L2 by identifying the Windows kernel-mode context.
